name: Calcolatore Interesse Composto
desc: Calcola la crescita di un investimento con interesse composto.
description: Calcola la crescita di un investimento con interesse composto.
seo_description: Calcola il capitale finale e gli interessi maturati con capitalizzazione composta. Con opzioni di capitalizzazione e tasse.
example_label: Projecting growth of €5,000 investment at 6.5% annual return compounded monthly over 15 years.
result_context: Your capital_final of {capital_final} shows the future value after {anni} years. The multiplicador of {multiplicador}x shows how many times your money grew.
steps: {'step': 1, 'description': 'Convert annual rate to periodic rate', 'calculation': '6.5% ÷ 12 = 0.5417% per month'}
mistakes: Using simple interest instead of compound interest for long-term projections
Forgetting that more frequent compounding increases returns slightly
Not accounting for inflation eroding purchasing power over time
